---
title: 'Plunger'
date: '2011-04-26T04:01:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'It''s Author Fun'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '6416727042816573718'
blogger_filename: '/2011/04/plunger.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/It_s Author Fun/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'TP Novels'
---

In the&nbsp;grimy&nbsp;forgotten corner of a restroom, resting against the tile, was a white handle, nicked and dinged from use. At the bottom of the handle was a black rubber base, now turned green from age or use one couldn't tell. The grout had turned a brownish black over the years. The water ran a steady slow stream from a faucet in disrepair. The restroom, like the store, was a forgotten area. Used daily but never really tended to.<br />
<br />
This particular restroom was located in the back of...
